OmniScript.name: CEIntake

childElements.name: AgencyAbbr
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "label": "Lead Agency", "helpText": "Select the federal agency with primary NEPA responsibility for this action.", "required": true, "controlWidth": 12, "options": [ {"label": "Bureau of Land Management (BLM)", "value": "DOI - BLM"}, {"label": "Department of Energy (DOE)", "value": "DOE"}, {"label": "Federal Highway Administration (FHWA)", "value": "DOT - FHWA"}, {"label": "Federal Energy Regulatory Commission (FERC)", "value": "FERC"}, {"label": "US Army Corps of Engineers (USACE)", "value": "DOD - USACE"}, {"label": "US Fish and Wildlife Service (USFWS)", "value": "DOI - USFWS"}, {"label": "Other / Multiple Agencies", "value": "OTHER"} ] }

childElements.name: Name
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "label": "Project / Action Name", "helpText": "A short descriptive name for this proposed federal action.", "required": true, "controlWidth": 12, "maxLength": 255 }

childElements.name: nepa_description__c
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "label": "Project Description", "helpText": "Briefly describe the proposed action, its location, and its purpose.", "required": true, "controlWidth": 12, "rows": 5 }

childElements.name: nepa_purpose_need__c
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "label": "Purpose and Need", "helpText": "Why is this action being proposed? What need does it address?", "required": false, "controlWidth": 12, "rows": 4 }

omniProcessElements.name: Step1_ProjectIdentity
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label": "Project Identity", "showLabel": true, "allowBack": false, "allowSave": false, "showCount": true, "validationRequired": true, "previousLabel": "Previous", "previousWidth": 3, "nextLabel": "Next", "nextWidth": 3, "cancelLabel": "Cancel", "cancelMessage": "Are you sure?", "saveLabel": "Save as Draft", "saveMessage": "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel": "Complete", "completeMessage": "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction": "", "showPersistentComponent": [ false, false ], "remoteClass": "", "remoteMethod": "", "remoteTimeout": 30000, "remoteOptions": {}, "knowledgeOptions": { "language": "English", "publishStatus": "Online", "keyword": "", "dataCategoryCriteria": "", "remoteTimeout": 30000, "typeFilter": "" }, "show": null, "conditionType": "Readonly if False", "HTMLTemplateId": "", "instructionKey": "", "chartLabel": "", "allowSaveForLater": false, "errorMessage": { "custom": [], "default": null }, "wpm": false, "ssm": false, "pubsub": false, "message": {}, "disOnTplt": false }

childElements.name: nepa_action_type__c
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "label": "Action Type", "helpText": "What type of action is being proposed?", "required": true, "controlWidth": 12, "options": [ {"label": "Abandon or Decommission", "value": "Abandon or Decommission"}, {"label": "Construct New", "value": "Construct New"}, {"label": "Modify Existing", "value": "Modify Existing"}, {"label": "Operate or Maintain Existing","value": "Operate or Maintain Existing"}, {"label": "Renew or Extend Existing", "value": "Renew or Extend Existing"}, {"label": "Research or Study", "value": "Research or Study"}, {"label": "Other", "value": "Other"} ] }

childElements.name: nepa_project_sector__c
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "label": "Project Sector", "helpText": "The primary resource sector for this project.", "required": true, "controlWidth": 12, "options": [ {"label": "Agriculture and Natural Resources", "value": "Agriculture and Natural"}, {"label": "Energy", "value": "Energy"}, {"label": "Infrastructure and Transportation", "value": "Infrastructure"}, {"label": "Mining and Minerals", "value": "Mining"}, {"label": "Recreation", "value": "Recreation"}, {"label": "Water Resources", "value": "Water"}, {"label": "Other", "value": "Other"} ] }

omniProcessElements.name: Step2_ActionType
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label": "Action Details", "showLabel": true, "allowBack": true, "allowSave": false, "showCount": false, "validationRequired": true, "previousLabel": "Previous", "previousWidth": 3, "nextLabel": "Next", "nextWidth": 3, "cancelLabel": "Cancel", "cancelMessage": "Are you sure?", "saveLabel": "Save as Draft", "saveMessage": "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel": "Complete", "completeMessage": "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction": "", "showPersistentComponent": [ false, false ], "remoteClass": "", "remoteMethod": "", "remoteTimeout": 30000, "remoteOptions": {}, "knowledgeOptions": { "language": "English", "publishStatus": "Online", "keyword": "", "dataCategoryCriteria": "", "remoteTimeout": 30000, "typeFilter": "" }, "show": null, "conditionType": "Readonly if False", "HTMLTemplateId": "", "instructionKey": "", "chartLabel": "", "allowSaveForLater": false, "errorMessage": { "custom": [], "default": null }, "wpm": false, "ssm": false, "pubsub": false, "message": {}, "disOnTplt": false }

childElements.name: nepa_disturbance_acres__c
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "label": "Surface Disturbance (acres)", "helpText": "Total area of ground disturbance. Enter 0 if no ground disturbance. Key thresholds: >5 acres typically triggers EA review; >640 acres typically triggers EIS.", "required": true, "controlWidth": 6, "min": 0 }

childElements.name: ExtraordinaryCircumstances
nepa_applicant_naics__c
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "label": "NAICS Code (optional)", "helpText": "Six-digit NAICS industry code for the applicant organization. Improves CE matching accuracy if known.", "required": false, "controlWidth": 6, "maxLength": 10 }

childElements.name: nepa_ec_multi_dod__c
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "label": "Does this project affect more than one DoD installation?", "helpText": "Check if the project footprint spans multiple DoD installations. Triggers multi-installation NHPA Section 106 coordination and USACE Section 404 dual-track review.", "required": false, "controlWidth": 12, "show": {"group": {"operator": "AND", "rules": [{"condition": "=", "field": "nepa_project_sector__c", "data": "Military"}]}}, "conditionType": "Hide if False" }

childElements.name: nepa_ec_usace_czma__c
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "label": "Does the project cross jurisdictional waters?", "helpText": "Check if the project discharges fill material into waters of the U.S., coastal zone areas, or essential fish habitat. Triggers USACE Section 404 pre-application coordination and CZMA federal consistency review.", "required": false, "controlWidth": 12, "show": {"group": {"operator": "AND", "rules": [{"condition": "=", "field": "nepa_project_sector__c", "data": "Water"}]}}, "conditionType": "Hide if False" }

omniProcessElements.name: Step3_AcreageAndEC
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label": "Site and Environmental Factors", "showLabel": true, "allowBack": true, "allowSave": false, "showCount": false, "validationRequired": true, "previousLabel": "Previous", "previousWidth": 3, "nextLabel": "Next", "nextWidth": 3, "cancelLabel": "Cancel", "cancelMessage": "Are you sure?", "saveLabel": "Save as Draft", "saveMessage": "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel": "Complete", "completeMessage": "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction": "", "showPersistentComponent": [ false, false ], "remoteClass": "", "remoteMethod": "", "remoteTimeout": 30000, "remoteOptions": {}, "knowledgeOptions": { "language": "English", "publishStatus": "Online", "keyword": "", "dataCategoryCriteria": "", "remoteTimeout": 30000, "typeFilter": "" }, "show": null, "conditionType": "Readonly if False", "HTMLTemplateId": "", "instructionKey": "", "chartLabel": "", "allowSaveForLater": false, "errorMessage": { "custom": [], "default": null }, "wpm": false, "ssm": false, "pubsub": false, "message": {}, "disOnTplt": false }

childElements.name: RunCEScreeningIP
childElements.propertySetConfig: {"integrationProcedureKey":"NEPA_CEScreeningIP","inputMap":[{"name":"AgencyAbbr","value":"%AgencyAbbr%","valueType":"reference"},{"name":"DisturbanceAcres","value":"%nepa_disturbance_acres__c%","valueType":"reference"},{"name":"ExtraordinaryCircumstances","value":"%ExtraordinaryCircumstances%","valueType":"reference"}],"outputPath":"ScreeningResult","failOnStepError":false,"preAction":true}

childElements.name: RecommendationDisplay
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "label": "Preliminary Recommendation", "value": "%ScreeningResult:Recommendation%", "helpText": "This is a preliminary assessment. The authoritative CE determination is made by a NEPA coordinator after submission. Per OMB M-25-21: AI recommends, humans decide.", "readOnly": true, "controlWidth": 12 }

childElements.name: ClassificationBasisDisplay
MatchingCEsDisplay

omniProcessElements.name: Step4_Prescreening
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label": "CE Pre-Screening", "showLabel": true, "allowBack": true, "allowSave": false, "showCount": false, "validationRequired": true, "previousLabel": "Previous", "previousWidth": 3, "nextLabel": "Next", "nextWidth": 3, "cancelLabel": "Cancel", "cancelMessage": "Are you sure?", "saveLabel": "Save as Draft", "saveMessage": "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel": "Complete", "completeMessage": "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction": "", "showPersistentComponent": [ false, false ], "remoteClass": "", "remoteMethod": "", "remoteTimeout": 30000, "remoteOptions": {}, "knowledgeOptions": { "language": "English", "publishStatus": "Online", "keyword": "", "dataCategoryCriteria": "", "remoteTimeout": 30000, "typeFilter": "" }, "show": null, "conditionType": "Readonly if False", "HTMLTemplateId": "", "instructionKey": "", "chartLabel": "", "allowSaveForLater": false, "errorMessage": { "custom": [], "default": null }, "wpm": false, "ssm": false, "pubsub": false, "message": {}, "disOnTplt": false }

childElements.name: nepa_regulatory_citation__c
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "label": "Proposed CE Citation (optional)", "helpText": "If you believe a specific CE applies, enter the CFR citation (e.g., 43 CFR 46.210(i)) or CE code (e.g., BLM B3.6). Leave blank if unsure.", "required": false, "controlWidth": 12, "maxLength": 255 }

childElements.name: nepa_agency_id__c
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "label": "Agency Project / Permit Number (optional)", "helpText": "Your agency-assigned project or permit tracking number, if one has been issued.", "required": false, "controlWidth": 12, "maxLength": 100 }

omniProcessElements.name: Step5_Citation
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label": "Regulatory Citation", "showLabel": true, "allowBack": true, "allowSave": false, "showCount": false, "validationRequired": true, "previousLabel": "Previous", "previousWidth": 3, "nextLabel": "Next", "nextWidth": 3, "cancelLabel": "Cancel", "cancelMessage": "Are you sure?", "saveLabel": "Save as Draft", "saveMessage": "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel": "Complete", "completeMessage": "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction": "", "showPersistentComponent": [ false, false ], "remoteClass": "", "remoteMethod": "", "remoteTimeout": 30000, "remoteOptions": {}, "knowledgeOptions": { "language": "English", "publishStatus": "Online", "keyword": "", "dataCategoryCriteria": "", "remoteTimeout": 30000, "typeFilter": "" }, "show": null, "conditionType": "Readonly if False", "HTMLTemplateId": "", "instructionKey": "", "chartLabel": "", "allowSaveForLater": false, "errorMessage": { "custom": [], "default": null }, "wpm": false, "ssm": false, "pubsub": false, "message": {}, "disOnTplt": false }

childElements.name: ReviewSummary
SaveCEIntake
childElements.propertySetConfig: {"integrationProcedureKey":"NEPA_CESaveIP","inputMap":[{"name":"AgencyAbbr","value":"%AgencyAbbr%","valueType":"reference"},{"name":"Name","value":"%Name%","valueType":"reference"},{"name":"nepa_description__c","value":"%nepa_description__c%","valueType":"reference"},{"name":"nepa_purpose_need__c","value":"%nepa_purpose_need__c%","valueType":"reference"},{"name":"nepa_action_type__c","value":"%nepa_action_type__c%","valueType":"reference"},{"name":"nepa_disturbance_acres__c","value":"%nepa_disturbance_acres__c%","valueType":"reference"},{"name":"nepa_extraordinary_circumstances__c","value":"%ExtraordinaryCircumstances%","valueType":"reference"},{"name":"nepa_regulatory_citation__c","value":"%nepa_regulatory_citation__c%","valueType":"reference"},{"name":"nepa_agency_id__c","value":"%nepa_agency_id__c%","valueType":"reference"},{"name":"nepa_start_date__c","value":"TODAY()","valueType":"formula"}],"outputPath":"SaveResult","failOnStepError":true,"postAction":true}

omniProcessElements.name: Step6_ReviewAndSubmit
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label": "Review and Submit", "showLabel": true, "allowBack": true, "allowSave": false, "showCount": false, "validationRequired": true, "previousLabel": "Previous", "previousWidth": 3, "nextLabel": "Next", "nextWidth": 3, "cancelLabel": "Cancel", "cancelMessage": "Are you sure?", "saveLabel": "Save as Draft", "saveMessage": "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel": "Complete", "completeMessage": "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction": "", "showPersistentComponent": [ false, false ], "remoteClass": "", "remoteMethod": "", "remoteTimeout": 30000, "remoteOptions": {}, "knowledgeOptions": { "language": "English", "publishStatus": "Online", "keyword": "", "dataCategoryCriteria": "", "remoteTimeout": 30000, "typeFilter": "" }, "show": null, "conditionType": "Readonly if False", "HTMLTemplateId": "", "instructionKey": "", "chartLabel": "", "allowSaveForLater": false, "errorMessage": { "custom": [], "default": null }, "wpm": false, "ssm": false, "pubsub": false, "message": {}, "disOnTplt": false }

childElements.name: ConfirmationMessage
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "label": "Your CE screening request has been submitted.", "value": "%SaveResult:ConfirmationMessage%", "readOnly": true, "controlWidth": 12, "helpText": "Reference number: %SaveResult:ProcessId%" }

omniProcessElements.name: Step7_Confirmation
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label": "Submission Confirmed", "showLabel": true, "allowBack": false, "allowSave": false, "showCount": false, "validationRequired": true, "previousLabel": "Previous", "previousWidth": 3, "nextLabel": "Next", "nextWidth": 3, "cancelLabel": "Cancel", "cancelMessage": "Are you sure?", "saveLabel": "Save as Draft", "saveMessage": "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel": "Complete", "completeMessage": "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction": "", "showPersistentComponent": [ false, false ], "remoteClass": "", "remoteMethod": "", "remoteTimeout": 30000, "remoteOptions": {}, "knowledgeOptions": { "language": "English", "publishStatus": "Online", "keyword": "", "dataCategoryCriteria": "", "remoteTimeout": 30000, "typeFilter": "" }, "show": null, "conditionType": "Readonly if False", "HTMLTemplateId": "", "instructionKey": "", "chartLabel": "", "allowSaveForLater": false, "errorMessage": { "custom": [], "default": null }, "wpm": false, "ssm": false, "pubsub": false, "message": {}, "disOnTplt": false }

OmniScript.propertySetConfig: { "saveType": "Integration Procedure", "seedDataJSON": "", "wrapperClassName": "", "pubSub": false, "showKnowledgeArticles": false, "trackingCustomData": {}, "currencyCode": "", "displayActionsType": "bottom", "labelBackButton": "Back", "labelCancelButton": "Cancel", "labelFinishButton": "Submit CE Screening Request", "labelNextButton": "Next", "labelSaveButton": "Save Draft", "labelSubmitButton": "Submit", "showProgressBar": true, "progressIndicator": "bottom", "allowSaveForLater": false, "warnings": [], "ssm": false, "bpType": "", "bpSubType": "", "bpLanguage": "", "bpVersion": "", "bpVersionPublishState": "" }
